utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format includes 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, and total_budget. The final package includes all seven of these categories. Each is fully specified: destination (Lisbon, Portugal) is clear; travel_dates (September 15–19, 2024) are specific; transportation includes flight details and cost; accommodation includes name and cost; activities list multiple activities each with costs; additional_services lists airport_taxi with cost; total_budget provides a complete cost total. Although the user also requested restaurants, this was not a required item in the specified format, so it does not affect the count.
